# Yohaku Companion v1.8.0

## Companion Moments

- Added a native one-shot composer for publishing the current sanitized desktop context to Yohaku Recently.
- Captures a frozen preview of the selected application and media state so published playback progress does not continue changing afterward.
- Uploads album artwork through an immutable content-hash path before publication, preventing later media changes from replacing an existing Moment image.
- Queues eligible publications locally when Yohaku Core is temporarily unavailable and retries them after connectivity returns.

## Privacy and compatibility

- Publishing remains explicit and consent-driven; pairing alone never publishes a Moment.
- Window titles remain excluded by default and can be included only through the composer control after existing source and privacy policies are applied.
- Moment publication requires Yohaku Core v13.16.0 or later. Existing pairings must be paired again once so the new `companion:moment:write` scope can be granted.
